notes: Aide maintains this file as the repository validation baseline and writes approved updates.
technical_manager reads the current file structure, gathers repository validation facts, evaluates tester refresh feedback, and prepares refresh proposals against the same fields.
tester chooses task-level feature validation from requirements and real repository evidence.

tester completes the current task-level validation as far as repository reality allows, reports unfinished items with reasons, and sends baseline refresh feedback through technical_manager only for reusable repository-level gaps in this baseline.
coder may run the lightest sanity checks but does not own feature acceptance.
